The ROLI Piano System is the world's first music learning platform to harness the power of computer vision and AI.
Omar Roy brings a thoughtful and balanced perspective to the intersection of piano pedagogy and artificial intelligence.
DC Metro Area Piano Students Serve Communities Nationwide Through Dr. Oster's 'From Our Hands to Your Heart' Initiative.
Airwave's innovative camera and hand-tracking technology is transforming personalized piano lessons by providing real-time performance assessments.
Olga Kleiankina is leading a new wave of piano education by integrating artificial intelligence into introductory courses, making learning more accessible and engaging for students.
The Community Impact Grants Initiative is empowering piano teachers and organizations to develop innovative programs that use music technology to support mental health in their communities.

Vochlea Music is revolutionizing the way musicians interact with their instruments through innovative AI-driven music creation tools that allow for real-time sound manipulation and performance enhancement.

Sing for Hope Pianos is a grassroots initiative that places artist-designed pianos in public spaces, encouraging community engagement and providing access to music for all, while also promoting mental health and well-being.

Hagelthorn is an innovative piano educator who is pioneering the integration of virtual reality into music lessons, creating immersive learning experiences that enhance student engagement and understanding of complex musical concepts.
